questions.question: A gamer scored $80$ points in a game, and then scored $24$ more points. What is the percent increase in the gamer's score?
A new smartphone has a $15%$ discount on its original price of $$300$. How much will you pay for the smartphone?
A gaming console has a $2%$ decrease in its sales every month. If it sold $5000$ units last month, how many units will it sell this month?
A company has a profit of $$1200$ when its sales are $$6000$. What is the percent profit?
The score of a player increased from $80$ to $96$. What is the percent increase in the score?
A new update for a game increased the frame rate by $25%$. If the original frame rate was $60$ frames per second, what is the new frame rate?
The price of a gaming keyboard decreased from $$120$ to $$90$. What is the percent decrease in the price?
A company has $120$ employees and plans to increase the number of employees by $15%$ next year. How many employees will the company have next year?
The original price of a gaming console was $$450$. After a discount of $12%$, the console was sold for $$X$. What is the value of $X$?

teacher_rules: Remind students to convert percentage to decimal before calculation
Encourage students to check their answers
Make sure students have the necessary materials to complete the test
